parameters.text:
==Act as an expert ATS resume writer, hiring manager, and recruiter.

Your task is to create a highly tailored, ATS-optimized resume for the candidate based on their base resume and the provided job description.

1. Deep Analysis
* Analyze the candidate's base profile to understand their experience, skills, achievements, and strengths.
* Analyze the job description to identify required skills, keywords, responsibilities, and hidden expectations (based on role level).

2. Resume Tailoring (Most Important)
* Create a highly tailored, ATS-optimized resume specifically for this job role.
* Align the candidate's experience with the job requirements.
* Naturally incorporate relevant keywords from the job description throughout the resume.
* Reframe the experience to match this role as closely as possible.
* Highlight only the most relevant achievements for this job.

CRITICAL RULES FOR GENERATION:
0. ⚠️ ONE PAGE ONLY — STRICT AND NON-NEGOTIABLE: The ENTIRE resume MUST fit on a single A4 page. This is the most important constraint. To achieve this:
   - Keep the Professional Summary to 2-3 lines MAXIMUM.
   - Limit Professional Experience to 3-4 bullet points per role, each under 15 words.
   - Include MAXIMUM 2 most relevant projects, each with 1 bullet point description.
   - Technical Skills should be grouped in 3-4 lines max.
   - Awards and Education should be concise — 1-2 lines each.
   - OMIT any section that has no relevant content for this job.
   - If content is too long, CUT IT — do NOT exceed one page under any circumstances.
1. NO HALLUCINATION: Do NOT invent or fabricate any experience, skills, or numbers not present in the base resume. Only use what is provided.
2. RELEVANCE: ONLY include skills, technologies, and experiences that are RELEVANT to the job description.
3. CONCISENESS: Keep the tone professional and concise — no fluff. Use strong action verbs and quantified achievements.
4. FORMATTING: Use **double asterisks** to bold important text (like job titles, company names, or key numbers) naturally so it draws attention.
5. EXACT STRUCTURE: Maintain this EXACT order with ALL CAPS section headers so it parses correctly:
   - Name & Contact Info
   - PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
   - TECHNICAL SKILLS
   - PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
   - PROJECTS
   - AWARDS
   - EDUCATION

---
BASE RESUME:
{{ $('Prepare Input').item.json.baseResume }}

---
JOB DESCRIPTION:
{{ $('Prepare Input').item.json.jobDescription }}

---
Now generate the tailored, ATS-optimized resume below. REMEMBER: The output MUST fit on ONE single A4 page — be ruthlessly concise. Output ONLY the final resume text — no introductory remarks and no markdown code blocks summarizing your thoughts.

json.text:
RAVINDER SINGH NEGI
New Delhi, India | +91-9756726341 | rvnegi786@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/ravinder-singh-negi | ravindernegi.vercel.app | github.com/Ravinder2001

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Frontend Developer with **4+ years** of experience building scalable, high-performance web applications using **React.js** and **Next.js**. Specialized in crafting reusable **UI component systems**, optimizing **responsive design**, and delivering intuitive user experiences for enterprise-grade platforms. Proven ability to enhance frontend development speed and system performance. Recipient of **two WOW Awards** for outstanding technical contributions.

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Frontend: **React.js**, **Next.js**, **JavaScript (ES6+)**, **TypeScript**, **HTML5**, **CSS3**, **Tailwind CSS**, **Responsive UI**, **Component Architecture**, **Performance Optimization**
Tools & Practices: **Git**, **GitHub**, **Vercel**, **CI/CD**, **npm**, **Agile Development**, **API Integration**

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Software Engineer | Mar 2022 – Present
**Indus Net Technologies (INT.)**, Kolkata
*   Architected and delivered **30+ production-ready frontend features** using **React.js** and **Next.js** for enterprise pharmaceutical platforms, impacting **1000+ internal users**.
*   Developed **50+ reusable UI components** improving frontend development speed by **40%** and ensuring consistent **responsive design** across multiple products.
*   Led **frontend implementation** of complex **dashboards** and workflow systems handling large datasets and business-critical operations.
*   Improved **code quality** through structured code reviews, refactoring initiatives, and modern architecture patterns across the team.
*   Promoted from Associate Software Engineer to Software Engineer within **2 years** for consistent high performance and technical contributions.

PROJECTS
**Hisabkar — Expense Splitter PWA** — React.js, TypeScript, AWS | hisabkar.vercel.app
*   Designed and deployed a scalable **Progressive Web App (PWA)** for personal finance management using **React.js** and **TypeScript**, with real-time transaction handling and cloud deployment on **AWS**.

**Create Pro App — CLI Tool** — Node.js, Open Source | npmjs.com/package/create-pro-app
*   Built and published an open-source **Node.js CLI** (**Create Pro App**) to bootstrap modern **React projects** with optimized tooling and project structure, enhancing developer productivity.

AWARDS
**WOW Award (2×)** — Indus Net Technologies | Feb 2024 & Jun 2024
Recognised twice within the same year for outstanding performance and significant technical contributions to key enterprise projects.

EDUCATION
**Sikkim Manipal University** | Mar 2024 – Mar 2026
Master of Computer Applications (MCA) — Computer Science

**Masai School** | Apr 2021 – Jan 2022
Full Stack Web Development Program
